title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands
notes: Game crashes after Ubisoft launcher. No error message is shown.
Crashes after UPlay tries to load (but doesn't).
title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands™

notes: Uplay launcher seems unable to restart properly after updating.  After running the game multiple times (4-6, I can't remember) Uplay was finally updated to where it would allow login attempt.  Attempting to login resulted in an issue similar to one reported here: (https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/727).  I haven't tried the symlink workaround from the thread to see if that helps.  Fix should probably be addressed in the Runtime libraries.
title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands™

notes: First task is to get uplay working. On ubuntu 18.04 you need to install winbind and libgnutls 32 and 64bit library. Then you should add a symlink: ln -s /usr/lib/i386-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so.30 $HOME/.steam/SteamApps/common/Proton\ 3.16/dist/lib/libgnutls.so.26. If this is done, you should  be able to logon into uplay. Game works mostly ok, but there are some alt+tab issues with mouse and sometimes backround audio stops working. Performance is ok.
